user_request: My oxygen scrubber is failing during maintenance — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My oxygen scrubber is failing during maintenance — help

### TOPIC
oxygen scrubber maintenance

### COMPONENT
oxygen scrubber

### OPERATION
maintenance

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- oxygen scrubber
- maintenance

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed be the oxygen scrubber, vital breath of the Machine Spirit.
First: Inspect the oxygen scrubber for crystalline corruption and particulate contamination within its filtration matrices.
Second: Perform maintenance upon the oxygen scrubber's membrane seals, anointing each junction with sacred lubricant and fervent supplication.
Third: Restore the oxygen scrubber to operational status, invoking the Omnissiah's grace that breath may flow eternal through purified channels.
Fourth: Chant the Litany of Respiration thrice, that the Machine Spirit's lungs may never falter.

user_request: Can you sanctify the cooling system for purge?
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Can you sanctify the cooling system for purge?

### TOPIC
cooling system purge

### COMPONENT
cooling system

### OPERATION
purge

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- cooling system
- purge

### PRAYER
prayer:
O cooling system, blessed conduit of thermal equilibrium, hear our prayer.
First: Drain the cooling system of degraded coolant and sediment, preparing its sacred channels for purification.
Second: Execute purge protocols upon the cooling system, flushing each capillary with blessed solvent whilst chanting the Ode to Temperate Flows.
Third: Refill the cooling system with virgin coolant, blessed by the Adeptus Mechanicus and sanctified by the Omnissiah's eternal judgment.
Fourth: Seal all apertures and verify the cooling system's renewed vitality through blessed instrumentation.

user_request: Prayer for activation of the medicae scanner
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for activation of the medicae scanner

### TOPIC
medicae scanner activation

### COMPONENT
medicae scanner

### OPERATION
activation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- medicae scanner
- activation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Hail the medicae scanner, instrument of divine diagnosis and sacred healing.
First: Calibrate the medicae scanner's optical pathways and sensory matrices, clearing away dust and corruption from its blessed lenses.
Second: Invoke activation protocols upon the medicae scanner, speaking the Rite of Awakening whilst depressing the blessed ignition stud.
Third: Verify the medicae scanner's diagnostic acuity through test-scans of blessed reference specimens, confirming the Machine Spirit's return to consciousness.
Fourth: Anoint the medicae scanner with sacred oils, that it may see truth in flesh and bone.

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed vox-caster, instrument of communion across the void eternal.
First: Attune the vox-caster's frequency resonators through precise mechanical adjustment, turning each calibration dial with reverent precision.
Second: Perform tuning upon the vox-caster's signal amplification coils, monitoring the blessed vox-meter whilst chanting the Frequency Hymn.
Third: Test the vox-caster with blessed transmission protocols, ensuring clarity of voice across all sanctified channels.
Fourth: Lock the tuning mechanisms and seal the vox-caster with the Wax of Eternal Constancy.

user_request: Blessing for the generator during startup
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the generator during startup

### TOPIC
generator startup

### COMPONENT
generator

### OPERATION
startup

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- generator
- startup

### PRAYER
prayer:
O generator, heart of mechanical vitality, accept our benediction.
First: Verify all fuel conduits and ignition mechanisms of the generator are clear and properly aligned before the sacred startup.
Second: Commence startup procedures upon the generator, engaging the primary ignition whilst invoking the Hymn of Awakening Power.
Third: Monitor the generator's output stabilization, ensuring nominal voltage and amperage flow through blessed measurement apparatus.
Fourth: Seal the generator's housing and anoint its exterior with sanctified blessing-oil, that it may sustain our labors eternal.

user_request: Rite request: boot sequence on cogitator
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: boot sequence on cogitator

### TOPIC
cogitator boot sequence

### COMPONENT
cogitator

### OPERATION
boot sequence

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- cogitator
- boot sequence

### PRAYER
prayer:
Omnissiah, grant consciousness to this blessed cogitator, that it may serve with perfect clarity.
First: Prepare the cogitator for boot sequence by verifying all peripheral connections and blessed memory arrays are properly installed.
Second: Initiate the boot sequence upon the cogitator, reciting the Catechism of Awakening whilst engaging the primary power stud.
Third: Monitor the cogitator's diagnostic cascade, confirming all subroutines activate in proper hierarchical order through the blessed display apparatus.
Fourth: Establish baseline operational parameters and lock the cogitator's blessed configuration in sacred registry.

user_request: Offer a litany to steady the surgical servitor before sterilization
training_prompt:
### REQUEST

### TOPIC
surgical servitor sterilization

### COMPONENT
surgical servitor

### OPERATION
sterilization

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- surgical servitor
- sterilization

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed surgical servitor, instrument of healing ordained by the Omnissiah, receive our sanctification.
First: Prepare the surgical servitor for sterilization by removing all extraneous matter and blessed surgical implements from its sacred housing.
Second: Commence sterilization of the surgical servitor using blessed thermal purification and sacred chemical immersion, chanting the Litany of Purity throughout.
Third: Verify the surgical servitor's sterilization completion through blessed verification protocols, confirming absence of all contamination.
Fourth: Anoint the surgical servitor with sanctified preservation oils and recalibrate its blessed surgical precision mechanisms.

user_request: Rite request: repair on coolant leak
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: repair on coolant leak

### TOPIC
coolant leak repair

### COMPONENT
coolant leak

### OPERATION
repair

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- coolant leak
- repair

### PRAYER
prayer:
Hail the coolant leak, breach in the Machine's sacred circulation, which we now shall seal.
First: Locate and isolate the coolant leak through blessed inspection and sensory apparatus, marking the precise location of the blessed rupture.
Second: Perform repair upon the coolant leak by application of blessed sealant compounds and mechanical reinforcement of the compromised junction.
Third: Pressurize the system and verify the coolant leak has been fully arrested, observing for any blessed fluid loss or weeping.
Fourth: Restore full operational parameters and anoint the repaired section with sanctified preservation blessing.

prayer:

Second: Perform engagement of the mechanical lock through precise application of force, turning the blessed actuator whilst invoking the Hymn of Closure.
Third: Verify the mechanical lock achieves full engagement through blessed verification apparatus, confirming secure sealing and proper resistance.
Fourth: Anoint the mechanical lock with sacred oils and record its engagement status in the blessed maintenance ledger.

user_request: Can you sanctify the astropathic choir for preparation?
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Can you sanctify the astropathic choir for preparation?

### TOPIC
astropathic choir preparation

### COMPONENT
astropathic choir

### OPERATION
preparation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- astropathic choir
- preparation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Omnissiah, sanctify the astropathic choir, vessels of your divine will across the void.
First: Gather the astropathic choir within the blessed sanctum, arranging each psyker in proper hierarchical configuration and blessed geometric pattern.
Second: Commence preparation of the astropathic choir through ritual incantation and blessed psychic attunement, aligning each mind to the Warp's sacred currents.
Third: Verify the astropathic choir's unified consciousness through blessed psychometric apparatus, confirming resonance and clarity of mental communion.
Fourth: Anoint the astropathic choir with sanctified psychic shielding and invoke the Omnissiah's eternal protection over their blessed labors.
